requirements.summary: Create MyWandsPage component displaying authenticated user's wand collection with count, list, and CRUD operations
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays total wand count prominently
Each wand is displayed in a card or list item showing its name
Add Wand button opens a form or modal to create a new wand
Each wand has edit and delete buttons
Empty state message displayed when user has no wands
Uses React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations

file_operations.description: Create page component that fetches and displays the user's wand collection using useGetWands hook. Display wand count at the top, show wands in a grid or list with name and creation date, provide Add Wand button that toggles AddWandForm visibility, and include edit/delete buttons for each wand. Show empty state when no wands exist. Use authorization component to ensure user is authenticated before accessing data. Include hero banner section at top using the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/wand-hero.dim_1200x400.png with mystical glow effects.

requirements.summary: Create AddWandForm component with text input for wand name and submit functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes a text input for wand name with validation
Submit button triggers addWand mutation
Success toast displayed after wand is created
Form resets after successful submission
Loading state shown during submission

file_operations.description: Create form component with controlled text input for wand name (required, min length validation). On submit, call useCreateWand mutation with the name. Show loading state on submit button during mutation. Display success toast on completion, reset form inputs, and close/hide form. Handle validation errors gracefully. Style form with wand-themed aesthetics using dark wood backgrounds, starlight borders, and elegant serif typography for labels.

requirements.summary: Create FriendsPage component displaying friends list, pending requests, and friend request functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Page shows list of confirmed friends with their names and profile pictures
Pending friend requests section shows incoming requests with accept/reject buttons
Search or input field to find users and send friend requests
Each friend entry is clickable to view their wand collection
Uses React Query hooks for fetching friends and pending requests

file_operations.description: Create page component that displays confirmed friends using useGetConfirmedFriends hook and pending requests using useGetPendingFriendRequests hook. Show friends as clickable cards with UserAvatar and name that link to their wand collection page. Display pending requests section with accept/reject buttons using useAcceptFriendRequest and useRejectFriendRequest mutations. Include input field for entering a friend's Principal ID and send button using useSendFriendRequest mutation. Use authorization component to ensure user is authenticated. Apply wand-themed styling to friend cards and pending requests section with oak/ebony backgrounds and starlight accents.

requirements.summary: Create FriendWandsPage component displaying a friend's wand collection with count and list
acceptanceCriteria: Page displays friend's name and total wand count
Shows list of friend's wands with names
Back button or link to return to friends list
Uses React Query hook to fetch friend's wands
Shows message if friend has no wands

file_operations.description: Create page component that extracts friendId from route params and fetches that friend's wands using useGetFriendWands hook. Display friend's profile (name and avatar) using useGetPublicProfile hook, show wand count, and list wands in a grid or list. Include back button linking to /friends page. Show empty state message if friend has no wands. Use authorization component to ensure user is authenticated. Apply wand-themed styling consistent with MyWandsPage using oak brown backgrounds for wand cards and starlight accents.

requirements.summary: Update Layout component navigation to include My Wands and Friends links
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes 'My Wands' link routing to MyWandsPage
Navigation includes 'Friends' link routing to FriendsPage
Links are visible when user is authenticated
Navigation maintains consistent styling with existing links

file_operations.description: Add 'My Wands' and 'Friends' navigation links in the header navigation section alongside existing links. Links should route to /my-wands and /friends respectively. Only show these links when isAuthenticated is true. Apply consistent styling matching existing navigation items. Replace existing logo with wand logo image at frontend/public/assets/generated/wand-logo.dim_256x256.png. Update header styling to use wand-themed colors (dark wood background with starlight text) and mystical aesthetic.

requirements.summary: Create React Query hooks for all wand and friend operations
acceptanceCriteria: All hooks use useActor to get backend actor instance
Mutations invalidate relevant queries on success
Hooks handle loading and error states
Success/error toasts displayed for mutations

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for wand operations: useGetWands (query returning Array<Wand>), useGetWand (query with wandId param), useCreateWand (mutation calling createWand), useUpdateWand (mutation calling updateWand), useDeleteWand (mutation calling deleteWand). Add hooks for friend operations: useGetConfirmedFriends (query), useGetPendingFriendRequests (query), useSendFriendRequest (mutation), useAcceptFriendRequest (mutation), useRejectFriendRequest (mutation), useGetFriendWands (query with friendId param). All mutations should invalidate relevant queries on success and display toast notifications. All queries should be enabled only when actor is available.

requirements.summary: Update App.tsx to include routes for MyWandsPage, FriendsPage, and FriendWandsPage
acceptanceCriteria: Routes are added to TanStack Router configuration
All routes are accessible when user is authenticated
FriendWandsPage route includes userId parameter

file_operations.description: Add route definitions for /my-wands (rendering MyWandsPage), /friends (rendering FriendsPage), and /friends/:friendId/wands (rendering FriendWandsPage with friendId param). Ensure routes are protected by authentication checks. Import the new page components.

requirements.summary: Design magical wand-themed visual style with mystical aesthetics using deep woods colors and starlight accents
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses warm wood tones and starlight accents
Typography uses elegant serif fonts for headings
Consistent theme applied across all new components
Visual style distinct from previous marketplace theme

file_operations.description: Update CSS custom properties to use wand-themed color palette with oak browns (#8B4513, #654321), ebony blacks (#1a1a1a, #0a0a0a), mahogany reds (#C04000, #8B2500), and starlight accents (gold #FFD700, silver #C0C0C0). Update font imports to include elegant serif font (e.g., Cinzel, Playfair Display) for headings. Apply new color tokens throughout the theme variables.

Update Tailwind config to include wand-themed color palette with custom colors for oak, ebony, mahogany, and starlight. Configure serif font family for headings. Add custom box-shadow utilities for mystical glow effects. Update existing color definitions to align with the new wand collector aesthetic.
